articles.title: N.H. police chief placed on leave after video released of him grabbing someone by the throat inside police station
articles.description:
An investigation into the incident is active, officials said.

The post N.H. police chief placed on leave after video released of him grabbing someone by the throat inside police station appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: N.H. police chief placed on leave after video shows him choking an individual.
Investigation into the incident is currently active, affecting local law enforcement trust.
Boston residents may feel increased scrutiny on police conduct following this incident.

articles.title: ‘Toucher and Hardy’ and 98.5 The Sports Hub clean up in spring Nielsen ratings
articles.description:
Overall, the Sports Hub earned a 12.4 overall share among men 25-54 in the period from April 2-June 24. Fellow sports station WEEI was seventh with a 4.2.

The post ‘Toucher and Hardy’ and 98.5 The Sports Hub clean up in spring Nielsen ratings appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: 98.5 The Sports Hub achieved a 12.4 overall share among men 25-54 this spring.
WEEI ranked seventh with a 4.2 share in the same demographic.
Increased listenership may influence local sports programming and advertising revenue.
